title: Media Blitz Hosted Consumer Integration
description: Integrate Media Blitz as a hosted Enki consumer through governed retrieval, package, feedback, and calibration boundaries.
acceptance_criteria: Media Blitz reads governed knowledge through consumer contracts only
Content and visual package flows are receipt-backed and attributable
Publication-shaped TEST distribution remains non-production and authority-scoped
Feedback ingestion and calibration preserve provenance and replay safety
No direct canonical mutation path exists from Media Blitz integration code
